attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.LANGUAGE_CODE, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.SOURCE_LANG, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.REGION_ID, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.CONTINENT, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.COUNTRY, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.COUNTRY_REGION, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.STATE, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.CITY, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.ZONE_CODE, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.POSTAL_CODE_FROM, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.POSTAL_CODE_TO, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.ALTERNATE_NAME, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.COUNTY, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL,
 (
 select REGION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL
 minus
 select REGION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.REGION_ID = STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.REGION_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS_TL.REFRESH_DATETIME
